badges.name: Java JDBC Connection
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of connecting to databases using Java JDBC, executing queries, and managing transactions effectively.

badges.name: AWS Cloud Practitioner
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding cloud computing principles, mastering AWS services like EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS, implementing cloud security best practices, and passing the AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner exam.

badges.name: MongoDB Essentials
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of creating, managing, and developing on a MongoDB database for their own data-driven applications. They can design and build MongoDB databases and collections, optimize query performance, and use advanced querying techniques. They have a strong understanding of MongoDB's internal structure, data modeling concepts, and security best practices.

badges.name: AI Concepts for Tech Pros
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding core AWS AI concepts, practical use cases, responsible AI, and security and compliance for AI workloads. They can also develop ethical systems, explainable models, and secure AI solutions.

badges.name: Algorithmic Problem Solving
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of systematically solving problems using algorithms, developing efficient and readable Python code, testing and debugging common coding tasks, and applying algorithmic concepts such as pattern recognition and encryption.

badges.name: Product Management Skills
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of leveraging essential product management skills to successfully generate buy-in, lead multidisciplinary teams, conduct research, and practically implement core skills for effective product management.

badges.name: Tech Leadership Foundations
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of giving effective feedback, managing time efficiently, empowering team members, establishing a motivating team vision, and fostering diverse and inclusive teams as an effective engineering manager and leader.

badges.name: JS Prototypes 2025 Course
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. Capable of mastering JavaScript prototypal inheritance, building custom prototype chains, and discerning differences from classical inheritance.

badges.name: LLMs & Human Language
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding and generating human language using generative language models, word embeddings, and vector storage/retrieval augmented generation. They can critically examine the results from large language models and have a basic understanding of how these language models function.

badges.name: Principles of Great Design
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of creating professional-looking designs using the four principles of great design: contrast, repetition, alignment, and proximity (C.R.A.P.). They can effectively use these core design concepts to create brochures, ads, business cards, and more.

badges.name: AI for Web Devs
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of using Generative AI to automate front-end design, enhance server security, optimize databases, and create code, UI/UX, and content. They can also ensure ADA standards are met and create simple chatbots powered by ChatGPT.

badges.name: Angular Interview & E-commerce
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of developing and deploying a full-featured e-commerce application using Angular 17, implementing advanced Angular features, confidently preparing for Angular-focused technical interviews, and mastering Angular components, services, routing, and reactive forms through projects.

badges.name: Product Management Essentials
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of identifying and analyzing market trends, developing strategic product roadmaps, employing key pricing strategies, enhancing collaboration with stakeholders, and aligning product visions with long-term business goals.

badges.name: Design Patterns Analysis
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of identifying and implementing various design patterns in complex software programs. They have the knowledge to exercise better control over object creation, realize relationships between entities, and recognize common communication patterns between objects. They can also understand the strengths and weaknesses of design patterns and implement them in various ways.

badges.name: GenAI Essentials for Everyone
badges.description: This badge signifies that the recipient has completed a learning track in generative AI, covering core principles, integration of AI technologies, effective prompt crafting, and practical applications for enhancing efficiency and decision-making. It also reflects an understanding of AI's ethical implications, limitations, and emerging trends. This achievement showcases a thorough grasp of how generative AI can be used to transform their business practices.

badges.name: React Fundamentals
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of creating robust user interfaces, managing state effectively, rendering dynamic data, applying various styling techniques, making API requests, and testing/debugging React applications with confidence and proficiency.

badges.name: Modern JavaScript
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding the fundamentals and advanced concepts of modern JavaScript, including asynchronous programming and object-oriented design. They are also skilled in using tools like Node.js and Webpack to create responsive, modern web applications.

badges.name: Software Architecture
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding and communicating the importance of software architecture, eliciting and validating architectural requirements, designing architectural structures to meet quality attribute requirements, and analyzing an architecture.

badges.name: Agile Project Management
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Pearson. The holder of this badge is capable of applying Agile principles and practices to project and product management. They can establish business value through incremental delivery, collaborate with customers, analyze case studies, drive organizational change, and implement design thinking.

badges.name: Git & GitHub Bootcamp
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding and utilizing version control systems and Git workflows, mastering basic and advanced Git commands, resolving merge conflicts, managing repositories on GitHub, collaborating with peers, contributing to projects, and enhancing workflows through Git customization and optimization techniques.

badges.name: Project Management Basics
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of applying core project management principles, mastering tools like Jira and Trello, implementing Agile practices, enhancing team collaboration in digital settings, and utilizing AI tools for productivity and management tasks.

badges.name: Blender Beginner's Bootcamp
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of confidently navigating Blender's interface and tools to create 3D models, developing practical skills in creating textures, environments, and assets, optimizing models for different platforms and render setups, and applying advanced techniques like particle systems and sculpting.

badges.name: Progressive Web Apps
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of building and optimizing Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) that deliver native app-like experiences in the browser. They can implement service workers for offline-first applications, utilize modern browser APIs, and add push notifications for enhanced user engagement.

badges.name: React JS Masterclass
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of mastering React fundamentals, building responsive user interfaces with Tailwind CSS, managing state with Context API and Redux, integrating APIs and Firebase authentication, and developing advanced React apps with real-world projects.

badges.name: Web Perf Optimization
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by O'Reilly Media, Inc. The holder of this badge is capable of setting modern performance goals for web content, detecting problems and bottlenecks, enhancing user experience, and auditing websites and web apps for improvements in perception metrics.

badges.name: Advanced JavaScript Topics
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of mastering advanced object-oriented JavaScript concepts, implementing functional programming techniques, effectively using JSON data, and understanding namespace and module patterns for better code organization in real-world JavaScript projects.

badges.name: Design Patterns in TypeScript
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of mastering SOLID principles, implementing creational, structural, and behavioral design patterns in TypeScript, and using Dependency Injection to create flexible and testable application structures.

badges.name: JS Async Programming Course
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of understanding the event loop, working with callbacks, mastering promises, using Async Await, and applying asynchronous programming concepts in real-world projects using JavaScript.

badges.name: MERN eCommerce from Scratch
badges.description: The holder of this badge has completed the following course by Packt Publishing. The holder of this badge is capable of building a fully functional eCommerce platform using the MERN stack, including modern React applications, state management with Redux Toolkit, robust backend with Node.js and Express, scalable database structures with MongoDB, and secure authentication mechanisms using JWT and HTTP-Only cookies.

badges.name: AWS Cloud Quest: Cloud Practitioner - Training Badge
badges.description: Earners of this badge have demonstrated basic solution building knowledge using AWS services and have a fundamental understanding of AWS Cloud concepts. Badge earners have acquired hands-on experience with compute, networking, database and security services.

issuer.name: Amazon Web Services Training and Certification
